sourceAmbiguity: Read-only, identity hold, and rebind could collapse into one vague blocked message.
decisionTaken: Publish distinct reason codes, components, accent treatments, and dominant actions for read_only, identity_hold, and rebind_required.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Patients can see what is viewable, what is paused, and what next safe step applies.
operationalRisk: Copy drift could blur the distinction later.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Extend the reason-code matrix and Playwright assertions before adding new posture copy.
